title: Demonetization Anthem Lyrics Thatrom Thookrom

seo.title: Demonetization Anthem Lyrics Thatrom Thookrom
seo.description: Full Demonetization Anthem songs lyrics, Thatrom Thookrom Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Kabilan, Music: Balamurali Balu, Singer(s): Simbu.
seo.keywords: Kabilan, Thatrom Thookrom, Balamurali Balu, Simbu, Demonetization Anthem full lyrics, Thatrom Thookrom songs lyrics, Demonetization Anthem lyrics snippets, Demonetization Anthem WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Demonetization Anthem lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song reflects the challenges and changes brought about by the demonetization policy in India, using humor and satire.

What is the plot context of the movie?

Thatrom Thookrom revolves around the impact of demonetization on everyday life, showcasing various characters and their experiences.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Simbu, known for his energetic performances and unique style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Demonetization Anthem was composed by Balamurali Balu, who is known for his catchy tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 11, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The Demonetization Anthem serves as a lively commentary on the socio-economic changes following India's demonetization initiative. With its upbeat tempo and engaging lyrics, the song encapsulates the confusion and humor surrounding the situation. Simbu's dynamic vocals bring the lyrics to life, making it both entertaining and thought-provoking. This anthem resonates with listeners, evoking a sense of camaraderie and motivation during challenging times.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Demonetization Anthem from Thatrom Thookrom is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of a significant moment in Indian history. With Simbu's powerful vocals and Kabilan's sharp lyrics, this song is a perfect blend of entertainment and social commentary. Experience the catchy beats and lively rhythm that make this anthem a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Thattrom Thookrom - Demonetization Anthem by Simbu, Kabilan Vairamuthu etc ..
The Gandhi notes have disappeared, and the banks and ATMs are in chaos.
The streets have come alive with noise, like a crowd gathered around a fallen tree.
They have managed to keep the middle class in check, only the poor are suffering.
The foreign money has gone bad like a bad smell.
No cash!! We can live by swiping cards.
No cash!! We can manage without asking questions.
No cash!! No cash!! No cash!! No cash!!
The panda's size can be adjusted.
No cash!! No cash!! No no cash cash!!
We can't see the movie without showing our faces.
Like fake notes, the situation has changed, breaking news has caused a loss of control.
The money that was supposed to unite has vanished. The money that was collected has turned into a white color.
The youth have lost faith in the government after being misled.
In the inheritance, everyone has been affected.
When I thought it was over, GST came in.
No cash!! We can live by swiping cards.
No cash!! We can manage without asking questions.
No cash!! No cash!! No cash!! No cash!!
The panda's size can be adjusted.
No cash!! No cash!! No no cash cash!! We can't see the movie without showing our faces.
In every house, there is no money, like a bird that has lost its way.
If you want to change the country, you can't just wear a coat and hide behind the walls.
Cash cash cash...
No cash!! We can live by swiping cards.
No cash!! We can manage without asking questions.
No cash!! No cash!! No cash!! No cash!!
The panda's size can be adjusted.
No cash!! No cash!! No no cash cash!! We can't see the movie without showing our faces.
Yes, demonetization has changed our nation, we have to ask the police station.
This is the global confusion.
What kind of life is this confusion?
